role_summary: Project manifest and operational configuration file that defines the system's identity, dependency requirements, build lifecycle, and development tooling for an automated code documentation utility.
finding: The system is designed to automatically traverse arbitrary code repositories, infer their high-level purpose and architectural intent, and generate a structured, technology-agnostic markdown knowledge base. It functions as a command-line interface with built-in capabilities for configurable file targeting, structured logging, environment/settings management, and external service integration to support automated semantic code analysis and documentation generation.
